user.title: Add DESS Monitor Local
user.description: Give this hub a friendly name. You will pick the connection protocol and address on the next steps.

protocol.title: Choose protocol
protocol.description: Pick how the inverter is reachable from this Home Assistant instance.

connection.title: Connection settings
connection.description: Protocol: {protocol}. Enter the connection address and how often Home Assistant should poll the device.

data_description.host: Hostname or IP address of the inverter / gateway / agent.
data_description.port: TCP port. Defaults: 8899 for Elfin/Modbus, 8787 for the local agent.
data_description.serial_device: USB / RS232 device path. You can also type a path manually.
data_description.agent_device_id: providerDeviceId of the inverter exposed by solar-system-agent.
data_description.update_interval: How often to poll the device. Lower values mean more frequent updates.

data_description.agent_device_id: providerDeviceId of the inverter exposed by solar-system-agent.
